calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-09-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret O'Dowd for and with Miriam Peacock (Petitioner).

The Court granted the 2nd Amended Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Chien.

At 11:00 a.m. and after the conclusion of the case, Mr. Peacock (Son) appeared in Court and said that he is contesting the Will. The Clerk informed him of this morning proceeding.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2012 Continued To Oct-03-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-10-2012 Continued To Sep-26-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Noah Peacock (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Peacock appeared to object to the petition. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to September 26, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Peacock to have his objections filed in writing. Mr. Peacock was advised to seek assistance from an Attorney. The Court will notify Ms. O'Dowd.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Continued To Sep-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Continued To Aug-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
